# Winamp classic skins — skinnable player aesthetic

**Clawmachine-fit rating:** A

**Notes:** Paradigm reference for theme engine: same functional shell, radically different skins. 'Really whips the llama's ass' — operator personality, not flat corporate.

**Credits / sources:** Webamp Skin Museum (skins.webamp.org / Jordan Eldredge), Internet Archive winamp collection, Winamp Heritage.

**Use:** internal non-commercial fair-use design reference only. Do not redistribute.
